feed.title: NLP Unit
feed.subtitle: The NLP Unit is a research unit within the Institute for Logic, Language and Computation; welcome to our website.

entry.title: CFP - 3rd edition of UncertaiNLP
entry.content: UncertaiNLP’s 3rd edition will be held at EMNLP 2026 in Budapest. The workshop brings together researchers studying uncertainty in human language and NLP tools, including LLMs, and how it can be harnessed to improve NLP. Don’t miss the CFP (deadlines: August 7, 2026 for direct submissions).
entry.summary: The place to advance uncertainty representation and communication in NLP
